context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the cachex-caching instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use cache warmers for expensive data** — pre-populate cache on startup

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify with stats** — enable `stats: true`, call `Cachex.stats/1` after exercising the code, and confirm `hit_rate` is non-zero
